@graph.name: The Whitestone Foundation
@graph.description: Whitestone Publications and programs in critical theory, public scholarship, and higher education.

@graph.name: The Whitestone Foundation
@graph.description: The Whitestone Foundation, dba Whitestone Publications, is a Boulder, Colorado-registered 501(c)(3) non-profit corporation dedicated to fostering critical thought for the public interest through independent research and open access publishing.

publishes.name: The Journal for Cultural and Religious Theory
publishes.description: A leading peer-reviewed open access journal exploring the intersections of culture, philosophy, and religious theory.

publishes.name: The New Polis Journal
publishes.description: A scholarly journal featuring rigorous academic articles on emerging trends in social theory and public discourse.

publishes.name: The New Polis
publishes.description: An interdisciplinary platform for critical analysis of contemporary cultural and political thought.

publishes.name: Esthesis
publishes.description: An interdisciplinary platform for thoughtful, innovative, sometimes provocative, and even quirky articles on the arts and contemporary ideas and culture.

publishes.name: Wild Globalization
publishes.description: A Whitestone Publications project researching ecological, cultural, technological, economic, and governance dimensions of globalization.

@graph.name: Victor Taylor
@graph.description: President of the Whitestone Foundation and a nationally recognized humanities scholar; executive editor of the Journal of Cultural and Religious Theory.

@graph.name: Carl Raschke
@graph.description: Co-Founder and Secretary-Treasurer; Professor of Philosophy of Religion at the University of Denver and author of twenty-plus books on theology and society.

@graph.name: Gary Bedford
@graph.description: Vice President and Board Member leading the Wild Globalization Project, researching civilization's ecological, cultural, and economic turning points.

@graph.name: Adam DJ Brett
@graph.description: Special Projects Editor for Whitestone Publications; a Syracuse Ph.D. exploring how Christianity, colonialism, and culture intertwine in North America.

@graph.name: Kev Grane
@graph.description: Assistant Editor for Whitestone Publications and a PhD student in the University of Denver-Iliff School of Theology Joint Doctoral Program in Denver.

@graph.name: Robert Spinelli
@graph.description: Assistant Editor for Whitestone Publications, an Archivist at Middle Tennessee State University who conducts multidisciplinary independent scholarly research.

@graph.name: Dianna Able
@graph.description: Assistant Editor for the Journal for Cultural and Religious Theory from 2020-2022; now an editor with Shambhala Publishing based in the United States.

@graph.name: Alyssa Putzer
@graph.description: Marketing Editor for Whitestone Publications from 2020-22, now a PhD student at the University of Wisconsin continuing her scholarly work in the humanities.

@graph.name: Olesia Stockhold
@graph.description: Part-time Assistant to the Publisher for Whitestone Publications from 2019-22; now Recruitment and Enrollment Manager at the University of Colorado, Denver.
